title: Cannot verify ADR-006 through ADR-009 have genuine alternatives — the single most common ADR defect (The Strawman ADR anti-pattern) cannot be checked without seeing the options tables.

§0.2.2 LLM consumption model is claimed as the foundational justification for all LLM provisions (referenced throughout) but does not appear in the document — without it, the causal chain for INV-011 through INV-015 and ADR-006 through ADR-009 is broken

The end-to-end trace (§1.4) is claimed in the Master TODO but not visible — this is the single most effective self-conformance check for a meta-spec, and its absence in the evaluable portion is a gap.

Cannot verify INV-011 through INV-015 are properly specified — each must have a plain-language statement, semi-formal expression, violation scenario, validation method, and WHY THIS MATTERS annotation per the format in §3.4. The Master TODO claims they are complete, but self-reported completion is not validation.

ADR-006–009 text is absent: the problem / options / decision / WHY NOT / consequences structure for the four new ADRs is not shown, so INV-002 (decision completeness) and ADR authenticity cannot be checked

INV-011–015 definitions are missing from the file: without seeing the formal expression, violation scenario, and validation method for each new invariant, INV-003 (falsifiability) cannot be verified for the additions that are the core contribution of v1

Critical: The next iteration must produce the COMPLETE document, not a tail segment. The most important claimed improvements (LLM consumption model §0.2.2, INV-011–015 with violation scenarios, ADR-006–009 with genuine alternatives, Gate 7 specification, §3.8/§5.6/§5.7 element specs) cannot be evaluated because they are in the missing ~60% of v1.

§3.8 (negative specifications element spec) and §5.6 (verification prompts element spec) are claimed complete in Part X but are absent from the file; these are the most important new element specifications and cannot be evaluated
